name: twelvelabs
description: Search, analyze, and understand videos with Twelve Labs video AI

interface.shortDescription: Search, analyze, and understand videos with AI
interface.longDescription: Twelve Labs is a video AI platform. Index videos, search them with natural language, analyze content for summaries and chapters, generate multimodal embeddings, and recognize specific people or objects with entity search.
defaultPrompt: Search my videos for a specific scene or moment
Analyze a video and generate a summary with chapters
Index a new video from a URL
